items.title: Cameo partners with TikTok to boost popularity
items.description: Cameo launched a new TikTok integration that allows U.S. creators to offer personalized videos through the app.

items.title: WhatsApp notifies hundreds of users who installed a fake app made by government spyware maker
items.description: The Meta-owned company said it identified around 200 users who were tricked into installing a fake version of WhatsApp that was actually Italian-made spyware.

items.title: Cognichip wants AI to design the chips that power AI, and just raised $60M to try
items.description: The firm says it can can reduce the cost of chip development by more than 75% and cut the timeline by more than half.

items.title: SpaceX files confidentially for IPO in mega listing potentially valued at $1.75 trillion, report says
items.description: The company has also lined up an unusually large number of 21 banks to manage the mega IPO, internally codenamed “Project Apex."

items.title: Hasbro says it was hacked, and may take ‘several weeks’ to recover
items.description: The American toy-making giant noted that it was continuing to "implement measures to secure its business operations," suggesting that the hackers may still be in the company's systems.

items.title: Less than a month: StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together
items.description: StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together on April 30. Space is limited. Register here for your pass.

items.title: Lucid Motors recalls over 4,000 Gravity SUVs citing improperly welded seat belts
items.description: The company struggled with quality issues when Gravity production started last year, and the new recall shows it's not out of the woods yet.

items.title: Nothing’s AI devices plan reportedly contains smart glasses and earbuds
items.description: The glasses will reportedly feature cameras, microphones and speakers, and will connect to a smartphone and the cloud to process AI queries.

items.title: Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise of open-source LiteLLM project
items.description: The AI recruiting startup confirmed a security incident after an extortion hacking crew took credit for stealing data from the company's systems.

items.title: Toyota’s Woven Capital appoints new CIO and COO in push for finding the ‘future of mobility’
items.description: Woven Capital is the growth-stage venture capital arm of Toyota, focused on backing founders building in space, cybersecurity, and autonomous driving.

items.title: Anthropic is having a month

items.title: Robotaxi companies refuse to say how often their AVs need remote help
items.description: Aurora, May Mobility, Motional, Nuro, Tesla, Waymo, and Zoox all refused to cough up a number during Senator Ed Markey's recent investigation.

items.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
items.description: OpenAI's latest funding round, led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, values the AI lab at $852 billion as it nears an IPO.

items.title: It’s not your imagination: AI seed startups are commanding higher valuations
items.description: Among the most recent Y Combinator cohort, many startups were commanding $40 million valuations. But with more money comes higher expectations.
